title: meliosma oldhamii
intro: Meliosma oldhamii, also known as the 'Clouded Meliosma' or 'Feng Dan', is a flowering plant species native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Meliosma oldhamii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestive health, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
